problem id: 39d3d49f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11001111 -> 11101100
  11111101 -> 00101111
  00100010 -> 00110111
  10101111 -> 11111110
  11111000 -> 11001111
  11110000 -> 11001111
  11110001 -> 10101111
  10111101 -> 00111011
  00111100 -> 01110011

query: 10001000
predicted answer: 11011101
